system.skills:
S: | T: | Ag:
Int: Common Lore (Administratum) +10, Scholastic Lore (Bureaucracy), Linguistics (High Gothic), Logic
Per: Awareness
WP:
Fel: Commerce, Deceive

description.value:
The Administratum is the bureaucratic heart of the Imperium. Its adepts process the endless records, tithes, census data, and requisition forms that keep the machinery of government functioning. They are physically frail but possess encyclopaedic knowledge of Imperial procedure.

Tactics: Adepts do not fight. If threatened, they surrender, flee, or attempt to talk their way out. Their value lies in information — they can be bribed, intimidated, or persuaded to provide records, falsify documents, or grant access to restricted archives.
